title: [VC+] Vanilla client +
description: A modpack for optimization and very much vanilla + add-on
body:
A fabric 1.21 client side modpack that add :

-optimization

-iris for shaders

-togglelable visibility of item frame with shift + click

-some ressourcepacks for glowing ores, pbr and more

-controller support

-memory optimization

-togglelable first person model with F6

-and a lot of cool feature
